sections.title: Iterate and Subflow Nodes
features: Added the new Subflow node to encapsulate a child flow executed once
Added automatic container resizing for Iterate/Subflow based on child nodes
Improved Iterate/Subflow visuals (inner surface + type indicator)
Added explicit runtime variable guidance for __currentItem and __currentIndex in the inspector for Iterate scopes

sections.title: Documentation and examples
features: Added Iterate and Subflow node documentation in the Help guide (usage, fields, examples)
Added dedicated guided examples: Iterate → __currentItem / __currentIndex and Subflow → single execution
Updated Help navigation to include these new examples

sections.title: Templates
features: Added the official "📖 Iterate + __currentItem" template
Template is ready to run to demonstrate __currentItem and __currentIndex usage in an Iterate sub-pipeline

sections.title: Documentation
features: Added the new "Pipeline design fundamentals" page in the user guide, focused on conceptual understanding and design best practices
Rewrote the content into a narrative format for clearer, more progressive reading with less list-heavy wording
Clarified the Multi-selection page: examples no longer suggest duplicating the Start node (only one Start node is allowed per pipeline)
Updated help navigation with a dedicated link to the new conceptual guide and matching breadcrumb trail

sections.title: Multi-selection editing
features: Added multi-selection shortcuts: copy, paste, cut, duplicate, and delete for multiple selected nodes
Added batch deletion for selected nodes with the Delete key
Documented multi-selection actions in the guide to speed up full-branch editing workflows

sections.title: API & resilience
features: Added retry configuration on API nodes (number of attempts + delay between attempts)
Aligned API retry defaults (3 attempts, 1000 ms delay)
Updated API inspector and templates to expose and prefill these settings
Enriched API execution details with the number of attempts performed
Global canvas keyboard shortcuts are now disabled while a dialog is open

sections.title: Documentation and navigation
features: Split help into dedicated node pages with fields, examples, and best practices
Unified navigation with dynamic breadcrumbs and a persistent sidebar
Added a responsive two-column layout and removed the old monolithic help dialogs

sections.title: Examples and templates
features: Documentation examples are available as official templates
"Try in editor" opens templates in a new tab
Simplified documentation ↔ editor workflow with ready-to-run JSONPlaceholder examples

sections.title: Variables and execution
features: Template rule clarified: use {path} and {#variable} (suggestions now match this syntax)
Map/Transform suggestions are context-aware and avoid non-interpreted formats
Execution console now shows variable values and the active environment
Per-node execution time is shown in each log group summary
A total execution duration indicator is displayed at the bottom of the console

sections.title: Environment Management
features: Create multiple environments (dev, staging, production, etc.)
Switch between environments instantly
Rename environments with a dedicated dialog
Delete environments with confirmation

sections.title: Variable Overrides
features: Each environment can override base variable values
Overrides are resolved automatically during execution
View which variables are overridden per environment
Backwards compatible: old pipelines auto-initialize with 'default' environment

sections.title: HTTP Test Diagnostics
features: Response metadata tracking: HTTP status, duration, response size
Response headers are displayed for debugging
Quick reference for API integration issues

sections.title: Node Features
features: Duplicate nodes with a single click from the toolbar
Fixed node cloning to work correctly with Vue reactivity

sections.title: Variables Tab Redesign
features: Two-column layout: environments & variables list on the left, editor on the right
Organized sidebar with distinct sections for environments and variables
SplitButton for environment actions (rename + delete menu)
Create environment dialog for better UX

sections.title: Simplified Setup
features: New pipelines start with a single 'default' environment
Cleaner initial state for new users

sections.title: Home & Navigation
features: Redesigned Home page with a clearer presentation of editor components
Added FR/EN language switch on the Home page
Top-left title in the editor is now clickable to return to Home
Improved visual and terminology consistency (pipeline wording, polished FR labels)

sections.title: Map Node
features: Added the Map node to transform each item of an array into a new structure
Supports {path} templates with fallback values to handle missing fields

sections.title: User Preferences System
features: Automatically open the Console tab when execution finishes
Ask for confirmation before deleting a node
Auto-fit canvas on pipeline open
Automatically reopen last pipeline on launch
Reset all user preferences in one click

sections.title: Interface & UX
features: Automatic saving with custom icon (floppy disk + sync badge) and status tooltip
Merged creation dialog: template selection and naming in a single step
Added 4 pre-configured pipeline templates to get started quickly

sections.title: Code & Stability
features: User preferences persist in localStorage

sections.title: Output Node
features: The Output node can now be renamed like other nodes
Displayed using the format "Custom Name (Output)"

sections.title: Execution Console
features: Console messages were refined to be clearer and easier to read
Main display was streamlined to show only essentials, with richer context available in details

sections.title: Node Visualization
features: Visual improvements were made to node rendering for clearer pipeline readability
Canvas readability was improved to make flow elements easier to distinguish

sections.title: SetVariable Node
features: New SetVariable node to extract values and assign them to your pipeline variables
The "Variable Name" field now only suggests parameter variables to avoid confusion

sections.title: Interface
features: Added a visible delete button on links to make removal easier without relying on keyboard shortcuts

sections.title: Bugs & Stability
features: Fixed variable resolution in the Output node (simple variable, object variable, and path cases)
Simplified output details to show only the requested output path and final value

sections.title: Variables
features: Use variables everywhere (URL, body, output path)
Combine text and variables easily (e.g. #host#endpoint)
Automatic variable suggestions while typing
Insert the selected variable exactly at the cursor position

sections.title: Interface
features: Headers editor in table format (easier to edit, no JSON needed)
Add, edit, or remove headers directly in the inspector
Shows the sent request (method, URL, headers, body) in a dedicated tab
View request and response in two separate tabs

sections.title: Bugs & Stability
features: Better handling for multi-line JSON
Visual validation for JSON headers and JSON body
Clearer and more user-friendly validation messages
API errors are shown in a more actionable way

sections.title: Quick Execution
features: Run your pipeline directly from the canvas
Fewer back-and-forth actions with the toolbar

sections.title: Bugs & Stability
features: More reliable execution, even on complex flows
Fewer unexpected stops during execution

sections.title: Interface
features: Cleaner palette and canvas for faster use
Inspector panel is easier to read

sections.title: 6 Nodes to Build
features: Start: the entry point of your pipeline
API Request: fetch or send data
Condition: branch into true/false paths
Filter: keep only the items you need
Transform: reshape data for your use case
Output: expose the final result

sections.title: Export & Import
features: One-click JSON export
Automatic filename generation
Guided import with structure validation
